---
title: "AdriftLab_AbruptChange"
author: "Alix de Jersey"
date: "2026-05-12"
output: html_document
---


# ========================================================================================================================
Abrupt Change Analysis

Creates figures for Abrupt recent increases in plastic ingestion by Sable Shearwaters (Ardenna carneipes)

Authors: Jennifer L. Lavers, Alix M. de Jersey, Jack Rivers-Auty, Alexander L. Bond

# ========================================================================================================================

```{r}
# -------------------------
# Load packages
# -------------------------

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# Load data
# -------------------------

abrupt_change <- read_csv("C:/Users/ampde/OneDrive - University of Tasmania/PhD/00 Projects/Shifting baseline/GitHub/Abrupt_Change_data.csv")
abrupt_change <- read_csv("Abrupt_Change_data.csv")

# Expected columns:
# Year
# BirdID
# PlasMassTOT
# PlasNumTOT
# Lids
# Nur

# -------------------------
# Basic data checks
# -------------------------

required_cols <- c(
  "Year",
  "BirdID",
  "PlasMassTOT",
  "PlasNumTOT",
  "Lids",
  "Nur"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(abrupt_change))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "The following required columns are missing: ",
    paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

abrupt_change <- abrupt_change %>%
  mutate(
    Year = as.numeric(Year),
    PlasMassTOT = as.numeric(PlasMassTOT),
    PlasNumTOT = as.numeric(PlasNumTOT),
    Lids = as.numeric(Lids),
    Nur = as.numeric(Nur)
  )

# -------------------------
# Figure 1: Plastic mass and count by year
# -------------------------

mass_range <- range(abrupt_change$PlasMassTOT, na.rm = TRUE)
num_range <- range(abrupt_change$PlasNumTOT, na.rm = TRUE)

scale_factor <- diff(mass_range) / diff(num_range)

df_long_num_mass <- abrupt_change %>%
  mutate(
    PlasNum_scaled = PlasNumTOT * scale_factor
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(PlasMassTOT, PlasNum_scaled),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Metric = case_when(
      Metric == "PlasMassTOT" ~ "Mass",
      Metric == "PlasNum_scaled" ~ "Number",
      TRUE ~ Metric
    )
  )

fig1 <- ggplot(
  df_long_num_mass,
  aes(x = factor(Year), y = Value, fill = Metric)
) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Mass" = "#56b4e9",
      "Number" = "#009e73"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Plastic mass (g)",
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(
      ~ . / scale_factor,
      name = "Plastic count"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Plastic mass and count by year",
    x = "Year",
    fill = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    ),
    plot.background = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  )

fig1

# -------------------------
# Figure 2: Lids and nurdles by year
# -------------------------

df_long_lids_nurdles <- abrupt_change %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Lids, Nur),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Metric = case_when(
      Metric == "Lids" ~ "Lids",
      Metric == "Nur" ~ "Nurdles",
      TRUE ~ Metric
    )
  )

fig2 <- ggplot(
  df_long_lids_nurdles,
  aes(x = factor(Year), y = Value, fill = Metric)
) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Lids" = "#EB6123",
      "Nurdles" = "#512888"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Count",
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Lids and nurdles by year",
    x = "Year",
    fill = "Item type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    ),
    plot.background = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  )

fig2
```
